value: Interactive mode added as default CLI experience (2026-03-18). Running 'amusic' or 'amusic /path' enters interactive prompts via @cliffy/prompt. Old default AcoustID behavior moved to 'process --acoust-id'. --show-tags preserved as non-interactive flag. Uses Prompter DI interface for testability. Also fixed pre-existing acoustId/acoustID casing bug in process subcommand CLI mapping.
